title: Implement Infisical SecretStore Provider using Infisical Go SDK
body:
## Summary
Create a new Dapr secretstore component for Infisical, leveraging the official Infisical Go SDK: https://infisical.com/docs/sdks/languages/go

## Background & Motivation
Infisical (https://infisical.com) is an open source secrets management platform with native support for Kubernetes and cloud/infra integrations. Supporting Infisical as a secretstore provider will enable Dapr users to dynamically fetch secrets from Infisical, both locally and in production.

## Implementation Hints
- **Directory Structure**: Follow the pattern used for other secretstores such as `secretstores/hashicorp/vault` or `secretstores/aws/secretmanager`. Create a new directory under `secretstores/infisical`.
- **SDK Integration**: The Infisical Go SDK is available at https://github.com/Infisical/infisical-go. It supports multiple authentication methods. Check the docs for all required and optional metadata parameters (API URL, workspace ID, environment, token/service account, etc.).
- **Metadata Fields**: Map component metadata fields to the necessary configuration for the Infisical SDK. Provide clear mapping in your component’s docs.
- **Component Interface**: Implement the `Init`, `GetSecret`, and `BulkGetSecret` methods of the secretstore interface.
- **Testing**: Add unit tests for error and success flows. Add conformance tests in accordance with [tests/conformance/README.md](https://github.com/dapr/components-contrib/blob/master/tests/conformance/README.md).
- **Documentation**: Document supported metadata, configuration example YAML, common usage, and troubleshooting.
- **Sample YAML**:
    ```yaml
    apiVersion: dapr.io/v1alpha1
    kind: Component
    metadata:
      name: infisical-secretstore
    spec:
      type: secretstores.infisical
      version: v1
      metadata:
      - name: workspaceId
        value: <workspace-id>
      - name: environment
        value: <dev|prod>
      - name: apiUrl
        value: <infisical-api-url>
      - name: token
        value: <access token or service account>
    ```
- **Reference Implementations**: Review how other secretstores handle error reporting, logging, and credential loading.
- **Go Modules**: Ensure the SDK and dependencies are added to `go.mod`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Users can specify an Infisical secretstore in YAML, provide required metadata, and successfully fetch secrets from an Infisical workspace
- Unit and conformance tests pass
- Documentation added under `/docs`

### Additional resources
- [Developing a new component guide](https://github.com/dapr/components-contrib/blob/master/docs/developing-component.md)
- [Infisical Go SDK Reference](https://infisical.com/docs/sdks/languages/go)

Labels: `secretstore`, `infisical`
